'''yokagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wagerable|wagerable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-k-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wagerable|wagerable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yokagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yokagithi|yokagithi]] || [[word:yokagiji|yokagiji]] || [[word:yokagishi|yokagishi]] || [[word:yokagiki|yokagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yokaguthuthu|yokaguthuthu]] || [[word:yokagujuju|yokagujuju]] || [[word:yokagushushu|yokagushushu]] || [[word:yokagukuku|yokagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yokaguthu|yokaguthu]] || [[word:yokaguju|yokaguju]] || [[word:yokagushu|yokagushu]] || [[word:yokaguku|yokaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yokagufthuf|yokagufthuf]] || [[word:yokagufjuf|yokagufjuf]] || [[word:yokagufshuf|yokagufshuf]] || [[word:yokagufkuf|yokagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yokagethe|yokagethe]] || [[word:yokageje|yokageje]] || [[word:yokageshe|yokageshe]] || [[word:yokageke|yokageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yokagothotho|yokagothotho]] || [[word:yokagojojo|yokagojojo]] || [[word:yokagoshosho|yokagoshosho]] || [[word:yokagokoko|yokagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yokagotho|yokagotho]] || [[word:yokagojo|yokagojo]] || [[word:yokagosho|yokagosho]] || [[word:yokagoko|yokagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yokagofthof|yokagofthof]] || [[word:yokagofjof|yokagofjof]] || [[word:yokagofshof|yokagofshof]] || [[word:yokagofkof|yokagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yokagÃŸfthÃŸf|yokagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yokagÃŸfjÃŸf|yokagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yokagÃŸfshÃŸf|yokagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yokagÃŸfkÃŸf|yokagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yokagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|yokagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yokagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|yokagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yokagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|yokagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yokagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|yokagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yokagÃŸfthÃŸf|yokagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yokagÃŸfjÃŸf|yokagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yokagÃŸfshÃŸf|yokagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yokagÃŸfkÃŸf|yokagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yokagÃŸfthÃŸf|yokagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yokagÃŸfjÃŸf|yokagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yokagÃŸfshÃŸf|yokagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yokagÃŸfkÃŸf|yokagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yokagÃḊthÃḊ|yokagÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:yokagÃḊjÃḊ|yokagÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:yokagÃḊshÃḊ|yokagÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:yokagÃḊkÃḊ|yokagÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yokagathatha|yokagathatha]] || [[word:yokagajaja|yokagajaja]] || [[word:yokagashasha|yokagashasha]] || [[word:yokagakaka|yokagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yokagatha|yokagatha]] || [[word:yokagaja|yokagaja]] || [[word:yokagasha|yokagasha]] || [[word:yokagaka|yokagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yokagafthaf|yokagafthaf]] || [[word:yokagafjaf|yokagafjaf]] || [[word:yokagafshaf|yokagafshaf]] || [[word:yokagafkaf|yokagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yokagasha|yokagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yokagshÃḋsha|yokagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yokagrosha|yokagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yokagmusha|yokagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yokagyasha|yokagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyokagnkshÃḋsha|goyokagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyokagnkrosha|goyokagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyokagnkmusha|goyokagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyokagnkyasha|goyokagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yokakagasha|yokakagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yokakagshÃḋsha|yokakagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yokakagrosha|yokakagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yokakagmusha|yokakagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yokakagyasha|yokakagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyokakagnkshÃḋsha|goyokakagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyokakagnkrosha|goyokakagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyokakagnkmusha|goyokakagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyokakagnkyasha|goyokakagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yekÃḊgasha|yekÃḊgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yekÃḊgshÃḋsha|yekÃḊgshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yekÃḊgrosha|yekÃḊgrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yekÃḊgmusha|yekÃḊgmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yekÃḊgyasha|yekÃḊgyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyekÃḊgnkshÃḋsha|goyekÃḊgnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyekÃḊgnkrosha|goyekÃḊgnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyekÃḊgnkmusha|goyekÃḊgnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyekÃḊgnkyasha|goyekÃḊgnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yokfagasha|yokfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yokfagshÃḋsha|yokfagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yokfagrosha|yokfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yokfagmusha|yokfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yokfagyasha|yokfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyokfagnkshÃḋsha|goyokfagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyokfagnkrosha|goyokfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyokfagnkmusha|goyokfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyokfagnkyasha|goyokfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
